# hasDividerLines

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether list displays divider lines between rows.

## Declaration

```swift
var hasDividerLines: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value of this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Customizing the List Appearance

- **minimumVisibleRowCount**: The minimum number of visible rows to display.
